attack.title: PayPay employees deserve a collective voice at work
attack.body: When workplace conditions change, employees should be able to respond together instead of facing decisions alone

detail.week: Major workplace changes affect our work, families, commutes, and daily lives
detail.month: Employees should have a say before major changes are imposed

attack.alert: A union gives us a way to <1>stand together</1> and defend the conditions that let us do our best work

form.title: We are forming a PayPay Workers Union
form.body: You may not expect the next demand from management, but you can be prepared to face it together
form.insurance: A union gives workers a voice
form.fight: We will <1>protect sustainable working conditions</1> and push for employees to be heard before major changes are made
form.form: We are gathering PayPay employees' opinions on workplace issues
form.please: Please let us know your thoughts
